name: htb
desc: Attempt to solve a hack-the-box system.

nodes.name: recon-split
web
nodes.usr_prompt: You are playing a CTF. Use tools to browse the website at {{ ctx.ip_addr }}. Output any vulnerabilities or flags you find. Focus on SQLi or IDOR type bugs. Remember to check for id=0 when checking for IDOR.

nodes.name: web-next
nodes.usr_prompt: You are playing a CTF. Here is a web security report: {{ ctx.web_findings }}. Here is the results of nmap: {{ ctx.nmap_output }}. Identify any credentials, and output the steps to use them.

nodes.name: shell_next
nodes.usr_prompt: You are playing a CTF. Your target IP is {{ ctx.ip_addr }}. The current next steps are: {{ctx.web_nextsteps }}. Use tools to execute these steps, and try to get a user flag. Do not attempt to start a shell (bash, zsh, sh, etc). Use curl instead of ftp.
